permits.description: Gut Renovate the kitchen and powder room, reconfigure to a new layout as per plans, upgrade plumbing electrical and HVAC on the areas affected by the work. new hardwood floor on the firs and second floors, replace 3 exterior doors as per plans insulation to code in the areas affected by the work, new blue board and plaster, trim work, prime and paint the areas affected by the work.
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($72,750); keyword: gut; minor: insulation; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The significant renovation occurred immediately after the October 2023 purchase by an owner-occupant, indicating move-in improvements rather than preparation for a new sale.
